title: sorbus americana subsp. japonica
intro: Sorbus americana subsp. japonica, also known as the American whitebeam, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to Japan. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Sorbus americana subsp. japonica include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
